active_goal.title: Finish v0.1.0-alpha usable product path
active_goal.target_claim: A new technical user can clone decentralized-forge from a published Radicle direct-seed address, verify HEAD, inspect the portable bundle, see seed status, and exercise one decentralized collaboration path while understanding the non-claims.
active_goal.success_gate: Public clone handoff, outside-reader rehearsal or exact blocker script, first-screen quickstart, seed status artifact, collaboration alpha path, regenerated bundle, and CI are green without unsupported claims.

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Convert the current first-public-clone RC into a release-facing handoff.
verification: focused public update and release-note tests

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Prove or package an outside-reader public clone check.
verification: fresh outside-reader clone HEAD equals expected retained-RID commit, or blocker script/template is recorded

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Make the public clone and verification path obvious before historical detail.
Generate an inspectable public seed status artifact from committed evidence.
verification: bundle report includes the status artifact

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Add the first usable issue/patch collaboration path beyond clone.
verification: selected-relay issue/patch readback verifies, or draft/export fallback validates

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Produce the final v0.1.0-alpha candidate package and verify CI.

standing_live_approval.approval_text: For what its worth I am totally ok with live IPFS/Radicle/Nostr/signing actions

approved_live_action_scope.scope: Free/project-scoped IPFS daemon/add/fetch/gateway checks for committed local fixture bytes and CAR/CID evidence.
Disposable/project-scoped Radicle public-network seed/clone/readback checks with temporary state and cleanup.
Low-volume Nostr publish/readback checks using disposable project-scoped keys and public relays.
Disposable or keyless test signing/provenance verification that does not use production/private personal keys.

blocked_without_separate_approval.requires: Separate explicit approval before paid storage, wallets, paid services, or spending.
Separate explicit approval before production/private personal keys are used for any protocol action.
Separate explicit approval before contacting specific people outside public project channels.
Separate explicit approval before persistent public seed operation, background daemons, cron jobs, or always-on services.
Evidence-specific approval and proof before durability, censorship-resistance, security, SLSA, broad availability, or production-readiness claims.
Separate explicit approval before creating a Git tag, GitHub Release, or public announcement outside committed draft docs.
